name: Up & Away
short_description: In Up & Away, control your vertical ascent through 40 levels using only one button. Use the environment to gain horizontal movement and unlock new paths to progress.
detailed_description:
About Up & Away:

Embark on a unique puzzle challenge with this addictive one-button game! Designed with casual gamers in mind, Up & Away features 40 levels of increasing difficulty across four distinct environments. With easy one-button gameplay, you'll control your player ship's vertical ascension and use moving platforms to gain horizontal momentum and clear obstacles.

Featuring a unique art style, our game is easy to play but hard to master. With addictive gameplay that will keep you hooked throughout, it's the perfect game for puzzle lovers of all skill levels.

Key features:


  • Easy one-button gameplay
  • 40 challenging levels across four unique environments
  • Unique art style that adds to the gameplay experience

Check out the screenshots and gameplay video to see the game in action. Get ready for a unique challenge with our one-button game!
